arts.ttl: Chelsea legend Didier Drogba once named the two toughest centre-backs he ever faced in the PL
arts.sum: In total, Didier Drogba played 254 games in the Premier League for Chelsea scoring 104 goals and providing 56 assists. Those goals yielded four Premier...

arts.ttl: Chelsea rival Liverpool for £42m wonderkid transfer
arts.sum: Chelsea and Liverpool are reportedly both interested in the potential transfer of Real Betis wonderkid Jesus Rodriguez. The talented 19-year-old has caught the eye in La Liga in recent times, and it’s not too surprising to now see that there’s growing speculation over his future. Arsene Wenger gave me an Arsenal shirt after a deal […] The post Chelsea rival Liverpool for £42m wonderkid transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Kobbie Mainoo to Chelsea? Man Utd star issues Cole Palmer demand
arts.sum: Mainoo, 19, has less than two years remaining on his current deal at Man Utd and although he is in talks to sign a contract extension at the club, Chelsea are eyeing a possible transfer this summer. Following reports of Chelsea’s interest in Mainoo during the January transfer window, Man Utd boss Ruben Amorim told reporters: “Our idea is always to keep the best players and the players we build for this club.But we know the position the club is in at the moment.

arts.ttl: Chelsea keeping tabs on 'outstanding' Championship prospect, he used to play for Tottenham - journalist
arts.sum: It would be a serious step up...

arts.ttl: Chelsea injury latest for Conference League clash vs FC Copenhagen amid Enzo Maresca boost
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has shared multiple injury updates, concerning key players, ahead of Chelsea's first leg Conference League showdown with FC Copenhagen on Thursday evening. Trevor Chalobah is featured in the squad for the first time since suffering a back injury against Aston Villa .

arts.ttl: Chelsea captain Bright signs new contract
arts.sum: England defender Millie Bright extends her Chelsea contract until next summer, with the option of a further year.
Millie Bright has signed a contract extension with Chelsea until the summer of 2026, with the option of an extra year.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea want to sign another teenager for £42m, he's an even better dribbler than Cole Palmer
arts.sum: He knows how to beat a defender!

arts.ttl: Three Chelsea stars drop early team news hints for FC Copenhagen game in Enzo Maresca boost
arts.sum: Moises Caicedo, Malo Gusto and Benoit Badiashile are among the Chelsea players who have posted pre-match graphics on to their Instagram stories, hinting that they may start in Copenhagen. Badiashile's hint comes after Maresca confirmed that he and Trevoh Chalobah were ready to play after recovering from injury.
